summary: Phase 3 Customer Credit Limit Control testing complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). All credit control APIs working correctly. Hard stop integration verified. Frontend UI loads and functions correctly.

CREDIT_POLICY_API.test_get_credit_policy: PASS - Returns default policy with segments (regular, member, vip, corporate, distributor)

CUSTOMER_CREDIT_STATUS_API.test_get_customer_credit_status: PASS - Returns complete credit info (limit, outstanding, available, status)

CREDIT_CHECK_HARD_STOP_API.test_credit_check_allowed: PASS - Small transaction within limit is allowed
CREDIT_CHECK_HARD_STOP_API.test_credit_check_exceeds_limit: PASS - Transaction exceeding limit returns allowed=false, requires_override=true

CREDIT_LIMIT_UPDATE_API.test_update_credit_limit: PASS - Owner can update credit limit with audit log

HARD_STOP_INTEGRATION.test_held_customer_cannot_transact: PASS - Held customer credit check returns allowed=false

DASHBOARD_API.test_get_dashboard: PASS - Returns customers_by_status, total_outstanding, total_overdue, pending_override_approvals

AT_RISK_API.test_get_at_risk_customers: PASS - Returns at-risk customers with risk_factors

AUDIT_LOG_API.test_get_audit_log: PASS - Returns credit control audit logs

RBAC_ACCESS.test_kasir_can_view_dashboard: PASS - Kasir can view credit dashboard
RBAC_ACCESS.test_kasir_cannot_update_limit: PASS - Kasir gets 403 when trying to update limit
RBAC_ACCESS.test_kasir_cannot_hold_customer: PASS - Kasir gets 403 when trying to hold customer

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.page_load: PASS - Credit Control page loads at /credit-control
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.dashboard_cards: PASS - 4 summary cards (Total Pelanggan, Total Outstanding, Total Overdue, Pending Override)
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.customer_status: PASS - Status Pelanggan section shows customer count by status (Aktif: 10)
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tabs: PASS - All 3 tabs working (Dashboard, At Risk, Cari Customer)
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.search_tab: PASS - Search input and button functional

verified_features.integration_with_sales_module: Credit control check integrated in sales_module.py at lines 477-500. Checks credit before allowing credit transactions. Supports approval override via approval workflow.

role_based_access.owner: Full access - can update limits, hold/block customers
role_based_access.admin: Full access - can update limits, hold/block customers
role_based_access.kasir: View only - cannot update limits or hold customers (403)

verified_features.audit_trail: All credit changes logged to audit_logs collection with action, module, target_id, old_value, new_value, user info, timestamp

critical_code_review_comments: Credit control properly integrated with sales module - hard stop working
All endpoints protected with proper authentication and RBAC
Audit trail properly logs all credit changes
Approval override integration ready (credit_override type exists in approval workflow)
Frontend UI displays all data correctly with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_created: Used existing customer CUS-AUDIT-003 (CV Berkah Abadi) with credit_limit 50jt for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Credit Control fully tested and working. Customer CUS-AUDIT-003 has 50jt credit limit. Hard stop integrated in sales_module.py. RBAC working (kasir cannot modify, owner/admin can). Approval workflow integration ready for credit_override type. All 8 credit control API endpoints working. Frontend page at /credit-control with 3 tabs.
